name: G-6 source-file validator: --file <path> mode (no --check) passes minimal structural check for _community plugin namespaces
command:
printf 'source:
  id: plugin-source
rules:
  - id: my-plugin/rule-001
' > sf.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-source-file.sh" --file "$PWD/sf.yaml" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'valid=true' err.txt && echo minimal_structural 1>&2
